readme.description: Run VerneMQ rootless and secure by default!
readme.introduction: [VerneMQ](https://github.com/vernemq/vernemq) (created by [vernemq](https://github.com/vernemq/)) is a high-performance, distributed MQTT message broker. It scales horizontally and vertically on commodity hardware to support a high number of concurrent publishers and consumers while maintaining low latency and fault tolerance. VerneMQ is the reliable message hub for your IoT platform or smart products.
